case_title: ALFONS ROSALES ET AL VS. SHAREEF EL-SAYED

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROSALES, ALFONS TIEV, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT EL-SAYED, SHAREEF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-14-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALFONS ROSALES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CAROLINE TIEV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAREEF EL-SAYED IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH THE MEDIATORS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THREE PROGRESS REPORTS ARE TO BE SET 5 MONTHS APART, THE FIRST ON JUL-14-2020 AND THE FINAL ENDING SOMETIME IN MAY 2021. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE HEARINGS IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE LAST PROGRESS REPORT IN MAY-2021 THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT EL-SAYED, SHAREEF ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-10-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDCE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES.
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT EL-SAYED, SHAREEF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JAN-24-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EL-SAYED, SHAREEF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-18-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT EL-SAYED, SHAREEF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-27-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, ALFONS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
